frontier.hypothesis: A source form that keeps t0-first-idx-load (target-matching delay slot) BUT rearranges the pair-window sll pair via a different mechanism than source-order flip (e.g. inserting a use-of-a0 or use-of-v0 between the idx-load and its shift) can retime the T-14 LUID tie without flipping T-16.
frontier.mechanism: The T-14 tie between the two sll's is decided by sched2's LUID assignment during rank_for_schedule; that LUID is influenced by intervening dep chains. Inserting a real use of the value between load and shift would extend a live range and potentially reweight the ready-list. Untried: forms where a0 or v0 is READ (not just written) between its idx-lbu and its sll.
frontier.next_probe: Sweep source forms with an early use of the loaded byte before its shift, e.g. `if (t0 == 0) { /* dead branch */ } t0 *= 4;` or `saved_debug = t0; t0 *= 4;` — must not add build insns (dead-branch or eliminable read). Requires t0-first source order preserved. Would need cc1 -dS trace + sched2 dump to confirm T-14 LUID differed.

frontier.hypothesis: The s14 w05 permuter campaign (s32 tbaseS chassis, PID 3756068) or s13 z07 campaign (u8* tbase, PID 3540094) finds a sub-vT40 form in extended sampling. The type-differentiated qty landscapes may reweight the T-14 LUID tie via a shared-base pseudo priority.
frontier.mechanism: s14 recorded both campaigns still warming with base score 220 confirmed. w05 was recommended in s13 frontier as highest structural distance from vT40. Continued sampling could still yield a novel find at any time.
frontier.next_probe: Next permuter/harvester session: check tmp/grind/marionation_Exec/s14/perm_w05/output-* and tmp/grind/marionation_Exec/s13/perm_z07/output-* for sub-200 finds; triage via s4/adiff2.py + s2 sandbox splice; reject uninitialized-read (vP160 class) or +insn (>179 build). w05 remains the highest-signal untriaged basin.

frontier.hypothesis: The twin cpu_side_move_dir_4 (parked, distance 7, 5 rules) exchange lever remains untried and its ip/g3 residual is documented as `the exchange alone` — solving twin first could yield the register-exchange technique transferable to marionation_Exec's pair-swap.
frontier.mechanism: Judge-constraints ledger note: `develop the exchange lever on the CHEAPER twin cpu_side_move_dir_4 FIRST (its ip/g3 residual is the exchange alone; masked ~6->0 on flip), then mirror here. The decisive allocation-equation material is in pre-merge commits aa8cad24 cd65f9c2 e5aa2dd4 f4bc8e67 df749bfd 622620cb`.
frontier.next_probe: Non-forensics session — route queue such that cpu_side_move_dir_4 gets its own session before further marionation_Exec permuter campaigns. Read the pre-merge commits BEFORE another permuter campaign here.

judge_constraints: FINAL owner ruling 2026-07-06 (do-while-zero-exception.md): do-while(0) sanctioned for ANY codegen effect incl. RA weighting, mandatory inline FAKE annotation; nested wraps additionally need a single-level-insufficient justification. The interim not-sanctioned ruling is superseded. STILL FORBIDDEN: regfix, register pins, __asm__ injection, semantic-lie C (cross-symbol derivation, per 2026-07-05).

candidate.c = vT40 (masked 4, verified): layer-1 review round-3 verdict was PASS-except-one — the NESTED wrap at line ~111 was held NEEDS_USER at the time; under the FINAL ruling it needs a documented single-level-insufficient justification (vT44 battery was staged to eliminate it entirely — check evidence). The Judge must independently verify that justification or its elimination.

Residual gap is 2 root-caused items (see evidence: pair-swap @56/57 coupled fixed point — sched2 LUID tie + qty_compare 5.33v5.33 tie; wrap toolbox measured DEAD for this pair). Do NOT re-derive the 140-ordering sweep, the 9-variant topology sweep, or the cc1psx parity test — all closed negative. Active lever at handoff: rich-pass permuter on the vT40 base.

STRATEGY (fable-blitz 2026-07-07): develop the exchange lever on the CHEAPER twin cpu_side_move_dir_4 FIRST (its ip/g3 residual is the exchange alone; masked ~6->0 on flip), then mirror here. The decisive allocation-equation material is in pre-merge commits aa8cad24 cd65f9c2 e5aa2dd4 f4bc8e67 df749bfd 622620cb (sessions 6f-6h: in-place basin correction, final qty_compare equation, s4 half-flip) — NOT fully represented in this ledger's s1-s3; read those commits before another permuter campaign.
